conflicts.reason: FPPS tp2 FORBIDs OLD BG2_TWEAKS cn:2100/2110, NOT cdtweaks (Tweaks Anthology). No actual FORBID with cdtweaks. Functional overlap only with cdtweaks cn:2100 (Thieving in Armor) and cn:2120 (Arcane in Armor) — both modify armor item opcodes. cn:2140 (Expanded Dual-Class) has zero overlap.

conflicts.theirComps: #2100 Allow Thieving in Heavy Armor #2120 Allow Arcane Spellcasting in Heavy Armor
